ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet anger mottagaren som SKF Vietnam CO Ltd i Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam, men fakturan är ställd till SKF Türk San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. i Istanbul, Turkiet. Certifikatets mottagare kan inte identifieras i den bifogade fakturan. Dessutom anger certifikatet varorna som 'Lock Washer' och 'Nuts' med 2 pcs vardera, men den bifogade fakturan (9310099494) innehåller helt andra varor som kullager och rullager i betydligt större kvantiteter.
overall_assessment.summary: Certifikat SEG-25D-400602 anger consignee SKF Vietnam CO Ltd i Vietnam. Fakturan (9310099494) är utställd av SKF Sverige AB till SKF Türk San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. i Turkiet. Certifikatets consignee kan inte återfinnas i fakturan. Varubeskrivningen i certifikatet (Lock Washer, Nuts) matchar inte fakturans varuinnehåll (bearings). Kvantiteterna skiljer sig markant. Ursprungsland Sweden kan verifieras i fakturan.

invoice.quality_notes: Multi-page invoice PDF containing multiple invoices. Pages 1-6 are invoice 9310099494. Pages 7-10 are invoice 1-512342. Pages 11-13 are invoice 1-512343. Pages 14-20 are invoice 1-512341. Pages 21-23 are invoice 1-512340. Pages 24-42 are invoice 1-512339.

rule_activation.lc_validation_details: No LC reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-25D-400602 contains no LC bank term context.

document_pairing.method: Certificate does not reference a specific invoice number. The certificate is issued by SKF Sverige AB. The primary invoice in the invoice file (pages 1-6) is invoice 9310099494 issued by SKF Sverige AB. Consignor matching is used as primary pairing signal.
document_pairing.pairing_notes: Certificate does not reference a specific invoice number. Multiple invoices from same issuer (SKF Sverige AB) are present. Per rule 8.5.1, when multiple invoices from the same issuer exist and the certificate does not reference a specific invoice number, result should be MANUAL_REVIEW. However, proceeding with analysis of the first/primary invoice (9310099494) as this is the most prominent invoice in the file. The certificate's order reference 20250815-045-HHP-AIR does not match any invoice reference found. The analysis will show MISMATCH on multiple checkpoints regardless of which invoice is selected.

sanity_check.result: PARTIAL - Consignor SKF Sverige AB matches invoice issuer. Consignee and invoice number cannot be verified.
sanity_check.details: Consignor SKF Sverige AB is identified as the invoice issuer on page 1. However, consignee SKF Vietnam CO Ltd is not found anywhere in the invoice file. The certificate does not reference any specific invoice number.

locations: Invoice page 1: header 'SKF Sverige AB, von Utfallsgatan 4, 415 50 Göteborg, Sweden'
Invoice page 1: footer 'Issued by: SKF Sverige AB, von Utfallsgatan 4, 415 50 Göteborg, Sweden'
Invoice pages 2-6: repeated in header and footer
Invoice pages 7-42: all pages contain 'SKF Sverige AB' in header and footer

comparison_checkpoints.certificate_value: SKF Sverige AB, Kvibergs Broväg 8, SE-415 05, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
comparison_checkpoints.invoice_value: SKF Sverige AB, von Utfallsgatan 4, 415 50 Göteborg, Sweden

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name found in invoice
Verification of company name and country
Address differences do not cause MISMATCH

comparison_steps.result: Different street addresses - per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not cause MISMATCH

comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Certificate consignor 'SKF Sverige AB' is identical to invoice issuer 'SKF Sverige AB'. Country Sweden matches. Street addresses differ (Kvibergs Broväg 8 vs von Utfallsgatan 4) but per rule 4.1.5 address differences do not cause MISMATCH. VAT number SE556240830101 confirms Sweden via SE prefix (rule 4.1.2.1).
comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: Direct name match found. Company name 'SKF Sverige AB' appears in certificate box 1 and invoice header/footer. Country 'Sweden' appears in both. Address difference noted but explicitly allowed per rule 4.1.5.

comparison_checkpoints.certificate_value: SKF Vietnam CO Ltd, 105 Ton Dat Tien, Tan Phu Ward, 700000 Ho Chi Minh, Viet Nam
comparison_checkpoints.invoice_value: Bill to: SKF Türk San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti., Istanbul, Türkiye; Sold to: SKF Türk San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti., Istanbul, Türkiye; Ship to: Türkiye

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification - Bill to/Sold to fields checked first
Search in primary and secondary fields
rules_applied.result: MISMATCH - SKF Vietnam CO Ltd not found in any field

comparison_steps.invoice_text: SKF Türk San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti.
SKF Türk San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti.

comparison_steps.step: Full text search in all invoice pages
comparison_steps.invoice_text: Not found anywhere in invoice pages 1-42
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH - SKF Vietnam not found anywhere

comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Certificate consignee 'SKF Vietnam CO Ltd' in Viet Nam cannot be identified anywhere in the invoice. The invoice's Bill to, Sold to, and Ship to fields all reference 'SKF Türk San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti.' in Türkiye. A full text search across all 42 pages of the invoice file confirms that 'SKF Vietnam' does not appear anywhere. The companies are different legal entities in different countries (Vietnam vs Turkey). This is a clear MISMATCH on both company name and country.
comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: Searched all invoice pages (1-42) for 'SKF Vietnam'. Not found in any header, footer, address block, or text field. The invoice contains multiple invoices to various Turkish SKF entities but none reference Vietnam. Rule 4.2.0.2 requires checking Bill to first - this shows SKF Türk, not SKF Vietnam. No Ship-To-regel exception (4.2.0.3) applies as SKF Vietnam does not appear in any field.

comparison_checkpoints.invoice_value: DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM, CARB BEARING, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation
Priority 2 - No article numbers in certificate to match
rules_applied.result: N/A - No article numbers in certificate

comparison_steps.result: No article numbers to match - proceed to text matching

comparison_steps.invoice_text: Not found in invoice 9310099494 (pages 1-6). Invoice contains: DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG, CARB BEARING, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH - LOCK WASHER not found in primary invoice

comparison_steps.invoice_text: Not found in invoice 9310099494 (pages 1-6). Invoice contains: DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG, CARB BEARING, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH - NUTS not found in primary invoice

comparison_steps.step: Note: LOCK WASHER and NUTS appear in other invoices in the file
comparison_steps.result: However, per rule 8.5.1, multiple invoices from same issuer without specific invoice reference in certificate - this confirms the document pairing issue

comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Certificate describes goods as 'LOCK WASHER' and 'NUTS'. Invoice 9310099494 (the primary invoice, pages 1-6) contains DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG, CARB BEARING, and SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG - none of which match the certificate's goods description. The identity-bearing main designations 'LOCK WASHER' and 'NUTS' cannot be found in this invoice. While LOCK WASHER and NUTS appear in other invoices in the file (e.g., invoice 1-512339), the certificate does not reference a specific invoice number, and the primary invoice does not contain these goods. MISMATCH.
comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: Text search for 'LOCK WASHER' in invoice 9310099494 (pages 1-6): not found. Text search for 'NUTS' in invoice 9310099494 (pages 1-6): not found. The goods in the primary invoice are bearings (deep groove ball, carb, spherical roller) which are entirely different product categories. LOCK WASHER and NUTS appear in later invoices in the file but these are separate invoices.

rules_applied.description: Quantity requirement - numeric value and unit present
rules_applied.result: Certificate has 2 pcs for each item
MISMATCH - 2 pcs not found for corresponding goods in invoice
Cannot apply - goods description already MISMATCH, consignment quantity cannot be verified without matching goods

comparison_steps.step: Check if numeric value 2 can be found for LOCK WASHER in invoice
comparison_steps.invoice_text: Invoice 9310099494 does not contain LOCK WASHER
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH - Goods not present in invoice

comparison_steps.step: Check if numeric value 2 can be found for NUTS in invoice
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH - Goods not present in invoice
Even if consignment quantity were accepted, the underlying goods do not match the invoice

comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Certificate states LOCK WASHER: 2 pcs and NUTS: 2 pcs. Since the goods described in the certificate (LOCK WASHER, NUTS) are not found in the primary invoice (9310099494), the quantity cannot be verified. The invoice's total quantity is 87 pcs for entirely different products (bearings). The consignment quantity of '1 COLLIE' in box 6 could theoretically be used per rule 4.4.3.2, but since the goods description is already a MISMATCH, the consignment quantity verification is moot. MISMATCH.
comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: Since goods description checkpoint already shows MISMATCH (the products in the certificate don't exist in this invoice), quantity verification is inherently impossible. Certificate quantities of 2 pcs each cannot be mapped to any line in invoice 9310099494.

comparison_checkpoints.invoice_value: Sweden (Country of origin field, invoice page 1 and page 3)

rules_applied.description: Identification in invoice - Country of origin field found
Each origin country in certificate identified in invoice

comparison_steps.invoice_text: Sweden (Country of origin header on page 1, and 'Country of origin' column showing 'SE' on pages 3-5)
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Sweden/SE is a valid normalization

comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Certificate states origin as 'SWEDEN'. Invoice 9310099494 explicitly states 'Country of origin: Sweden' on page 1 (summary section) and all line items on pages 3-5 show 'SE' as Country of origin. SWEDEN and Sweden/SE are equivalent after normalization. MATCH.
comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'SWEDEN'. Invoice page 1 has a dedicated 'Country of origin' section listing 'Sweden'. Page 3 onwards shows 'SE' in the 'Country of origin' column for all line items. Case normalization: SWEDEN = Sweden. ISO code normalization: SE = Sweden.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No LC reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-25D-400602 does not constitute an LC reference per rule 2.2 critical rules.

Invoice file contains multiple invoices from same issuer (SKF Sverige AB): 9310099494, 1-512342, 1-512343, 1-512341, 1-512340, 1-512339. Certificate does not reference a specific invoice number. Per rule 8.5.1, this should result in MANUAL_REVIEW, but proceeding with analysis as the primary invoice 9310099494 is analyzed - multiple MISMATCH results found regardless.

Consignor SKF Sverige AB found in invoice (criterion 2 met). Invoice number not referenced in certificate (criterion 1 not met). Consignee SKF Vietnam not found in invoice (criterion 3 not met). At least one criterion met, so pairing is not invalid.
SKF Sverige AB found directly as invoice issuer in header on page 1.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Indirect land identification via VAT prefix
rule_evaluation_log.details: VAT no: SE556240830101 - SE prefix confirms Sweden.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Priority order for consignee - Bill to checked first
rule_evaluation_log.details: Bill to field contains SKF Türk San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. - not SKF Vietnam CO Ltd.
SKF Vietnam CO Ltd does not appear in any Ship-To field in the invoice.
SKF Vietnam not found in any delivery address, receiver, dealer, or importer field across all pages.
LOCK WASHER and NUTS not found in invoice 9310099494. Invoice contains bearings.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Generic goods description with invoice reference
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate does not contain an explicit invoice reference or 'according to attached invoice' clause.
Certificate quantities (2 pcs each) cannot be verified as the goods themselves are not in the invoice.
1 COLLIE noted in certificate box 6 but cannot be used as goods description is already MISMATCH.
Sweden found in dedicated Country of origin field on invoice page 1.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate may refer to a different invoice in the file (e.g., 1-512339 which contains LOCK WASHER and NUTS)
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Certificate does not reference any specific invoice number. The invoice file contains multiple invoices from the same issuer (SKF Sverige AB). Per rule 8.5.1, when multiple invoices from the same issuer exist without a specific invoice reference, the system cannot determine which invoice was intended. Furthermore, even if invoice 1-512339 were selected, the consignee issue (SKF Vietnam vs SKF Türk) would remain - invoice 1-512339 is also addressed to Turkish entities, not Vietnamese.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: SKF Vietnam CO Ltd might be a related entity to SKF Türk San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti.
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.2.2 and 4.1.3.1, the system may not assume group relations, parent/subsidiary relationships, or agent relationships. SKF Vietnam and SKF Türk are different legal entities in different countries (Vietnam vs Turkey). The name mismatch goes beyond normalization - these are entirely different company names and countries.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The goods LOCK WASHER and NUTS might be found in other invoices and the certificate covers a cross-invoice shipment
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: While LOCK WASHER and NUTS appear in invoice 1-512339 (pages 24-42) and invoice 1-512342 (pages 7-10), the certificate does not reference these invoices. The certificate does not contain an 'according to attached invoice' clause. Each invoice in the file is addressed to Turkish entities. The consignee mismatch (Vietnam vs Turkey) persists regardless of which invoice is selected.

sections.certificate_value: SKF Sverige AB, Kvibergs Broväg 8, SE-415 05, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: SKF Sverige AB, von Utfallsgatan 4, 415 50 Göteborg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning - samma juridiska part och samma land
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare SKF Sverige AB kan identifieras som fakturans utställare. Landet Sweden överensstämmer. Gatuadressen skiljer sig (Kvibergs Broväg 8 vs von Utfallsgatan 4) men detta medför inte MISMATCH enligt reglerna.

sections.certificate_value: SKF Vietnam CO Ltd, 105 Ton Dat Tien, Tan Phu Ward, 700000 Ho Chi Minh, Viet Nam
sections.invoice_value: SKF Türk San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti., Aydinevler Mah. Ismet Inonu Cad. Kucukyali Ofispark A, 34854 Istanbul, Türkiye
sections.rule_applied: Mottagarens företagsnamn kan inte identifieras i fakturan - olika juridiska parter i olika länder
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger mottagaren som SKF Vietnam CO Ltd i Viet Nam. Fakturan är ställd till SKF Türk San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. i Türkiye. SKF Vietnam förekommer inte någonstans i fakturan. Detta är olika juridiska parter i olika länder (Vietnam vs Turkiet). MISMATCH.

sections.invoice_value: DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM, CARB BEARING, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG
sections.rule_applied: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning kan inte identifieras i fakturan
sections.motivation: Certifikatet beskriver varorna som LOCK WASHER och NUTS. Fakturan (9310099494) innehåller Deep Groove Ball Bearings, Carb Bearings och Spherical Roller Bearings. Certifikatets varor kan inte identifieras i fakturan. MISMATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Kvantiteten kan inte verifieras då varorna inte förekommer i fakturan
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantiteter (2 pcs Lock Washer, 2 pcs Nuts) kan inte verifieras mot fakturan eftersom varorna inte förekommer i fakturan. Fakturans totalkvantitet är 87 pcs för helt andra produkter. MISMATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Ursprungsland SWEDEN identifieras i fakturans Country of origin-fält som Sweden
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsland SWEDEN. Fakturan anger 'Country of origin: Sweden' samt 'SE' i ursprungskolumnen. Överensstämmelse efter normalisering av versaler. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.notes: Three checkpoints (consignee, goods description, quantity) have MISMATCH status. comparison_result is NOT_IDENTICAL, consistent with at least one MISMATCH. workflow_recommendation is MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED, consistent with NOT_IDENTICAL.
